steps.title: Compare with perimeter form
steps.content:
A rectangle with length $x$ and width $w$ has perimeter
$$P=2x+2w$$
The given function is
$$f(x)=2x+186$$

steps.title: Find the fixed width
steps.content: The constant part of the perimeter equals twice the width. $$2w=186$$ $$w=93$$ The answer is B.
